title: Ichnanthus nemoralis
taxonomy: Ichnanthus nemoralis is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the tribe Paniceae and is commonly known as a type of grass. The genus Ichnanthus is a group of grasses found in the tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas. Ichnanthus nemoralis is native to the Americas and is often found in humid and subtropical environments. Its classification is further defined by its characteristics and similarities to other species within the tribe Paniceae.

Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and inflammation.
